nasb.text: So Solomon overlaid the inside of the house with pure gold. And he drew chains of gold across the front of the inner sanctuary, and he overlaid it with gold.

esv.text: And Solomon overlaid the inside of the house with pure gold, and he drew chains of gold across, in front of the inner sanctuary, and overlaid it with gold.

cnv.text: 殿的內部所羅門都貼上精金，把金鍊掛在內殿的前面，內殿也都貼上精金。

ccb.text: 殿内全部贴上纯金，至圣所前面有金链拦着。
